name: Improper Isolation or Compartmentalization
description: The product does not properly compartmentalize or isolate functionality, processes, or resources that require different privilege levels. When weaknesses exist in lower-privileged areas, attackers can leverage them to access higher-privileged functions without additional barriers.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL nodes representing different privilege zones share resources or paths without CONTROL[boundary] or AUTH[privilege_check] nodes enforcing separation between zones of different trust levels
